evidence.claim: Developed recommendation system for discovery feed
evidence.source_text: my main project for the last 18 months has been the recommendation system that powers our discovery feed

evidence.claim: Experience with A/B testing, drift monitoring, and retraining schedules
evidence.source_text: A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling, feature, and training/eval pipelines
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in LangChain, PEFT, Embeddings, Haystack, PostgreSQL, Weaviate, BentoML, YOLO, Go, LoRA, RAG, Airflow, Diffusion Models, Computer Vision, Semantic Search, NLP
evidence.source_text: Skills: LangChain (expert, 44mo), PEFT (expert, 42mo), Embeddings (advanced, 24mo), Haystack (expert, 64mo), PostgreSQL (intermediate, 19mo), Weaviate (expert, 72mo), BentoML (advanced, 35mo), YOLO (advanced, 30mo), Go (beginner, 2mo), LoRA (expert, 68mo), RAG (expert, 79mo), Airflow (intermediate, 24mo), Diffusion Models (advanced, 24mo), Computer Vision (advanced, 47mo), Semantic Search (expert, 38mo), NLP (expert, 37mo)

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Focus on infrastructure and data quality over modeling
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.
